description: Developed and enhanced AML, KYC verification, and fraud detection modules using React.js, delivering scalable compliance solutions for enterprise clients.
Designed APIs and optimized PDF report generation workflows, eliminating browser blocking issues and improving application reliability.
Built Video KYC (vKYC) module using OpenVidu (WebRTC) with dynamic camera controls, watermark-based customization, resilient streaming, reconnection handling, and latency optimization.
Implemented mTLS authentication for secure client-server communication, enabling encrypted data exchange and strong identity verification.
Improved application performance and responsiveness through optimized rendering, efficient API handling, and modern frontend best practices.
Developed and maintained key features for ICICI Prudential insurance web applications using React.js and jQuery.
Converted Figma designs into responsive, cross-browser compatible user interfaces with improved user experience.
Implemented Core Web Vitals optimization strategies, reducing initial loading time to approximately 1 second and improving performance and SEO rankings.
Debugged and resolved client-reported production issues, ensuring application stability and reliability.
Collaborated with product managers, backend engineers, and designers while conducting code reviews to improve code quality and maintainability.

company: ExpertRec Custom Search Engine (Cloudbash Technologies Pvt Ltd)
description: Led the end-to-end development of a React.js Control Panel dashboard from scratch, building scalable features for real-time indexing, cron-based crawling, re-crawling, pause/resume, and data indexing controls.
Developed responsive and cross-browser compatible interfaces using Material UI, Angular Nebular, and Handlebars.js, improving search experiences across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.
Designed frontend-backend workflows, implemented payment integration flows, integrated Brevo APIs for analytics, and handled complex business edge cases.
Improved product quality by debugging critical issues, resolving complex CSS conflicts, and writing automated test cases using Pytest, Nightwatch.js, and Protractor.js.
Designed new UI themes, developed Bash automation scripts, proposed product improvements, and collaborated with teams to deliver scalable solutions.
